description: Create a Jira issue with a short markdown body (heading + 2 bullets). Input-only — measures what the agent emits on the tool call; no Jira mutation.

fields.summary: Settings profile Save button returns HTTP 500

arms.skill: bash acli command with markdown inlined via <(mdadf --compact <<'MD' ... MD)
arms.mcp-adf: createJiraIssue tool call with description as stringified ADF (default contentFormat)
arms.mcp-md: createJiraIssue tool call with description as markdown + contentFormat='markdown'
